title: Banana Ice Cream
excerpt: Ingredients 8 bananas sliced into rounds 90 ml peanut butter Method The night before, place the banana rounds on a baking tray in the freezer. html:
Ingredients

  • 8 bananas sliced into rounds
  • 90 ml peanut butter

Method

The night before, place the banana rounds on a baking tray in the freezer.

Take the bananas out of the freezer and let them soften just slightly. Place in a food processor. Blitz until smooth.

Add peanut butter.

Serve in a pretty little glass jar with fine toffee and nut brittle crumbs.

Easy!
